title: Nike Air Force 1 Low Foamposite Pro Reportedly Returning in "Gym Red"
summary:
Name: Nike Air Force 1 Low Foamposite Pro "Gym Red"Colorway: Malachite/University Gold-Gum Medium Brown-Coconut MilkSKU: JJ3675-687Retail Price: $180 USDRelease Date: Summer 2027Where to Buy: NikeNike is rumored to be expanding its hybrid lifestyle footwear lineup with the purported return of the Air Force 1 Low Foamposite Pro "Gym Red." The striking low-top silhouette is tentatively scheduled to make its debut window sometime in 2027.Rumors suggest that the upcoming release will merge the timeless streetwear architecture of the classic Air Force 1 Low with the rigid, molded polyurethane shell technology native to the Foamposite Pro series. The upper is expected to feature a vibrant "Gym Red" color scheme, likely adopting the signature metallic sheen and undulating side panel grooves inherent to traditional Foam constructions. Suggested details remain highly speculative regarding potential accent tones, midfoot jewel Swoosh materials, or interior mesh bootie elements. Because official project specifications have not been formally finalized by the brand, the layout represents an early look at how the label might reintroduce its multi-era basketball crossovers to a new generation of lifestyle collectors.

Click here to view full gallery at Hypebeast
